name: Hypha Labs, Inc.
summary: Background Hypha Labs, Inc. was incorporated in Nevada on October 5, 2010. Hypha Labs, Inc. and its subsidiaries (Hypha Labs, the Company, we, our or us) was a service-oriented independent testing laboratory, data analytics and media firm focused on the developing cannabis and hemp markets, and supported the cannabis industrys best practices for reliable testing.
